name: Icy Slip Claims at Work in North Salt Lake

mainEntity.name: How to file workers' comp for slip on ice at work in North Salt Lake Utah?
mainEntity.text: How to file workers' comp for slip on ice at work in North Salt Lake Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report icy slip immediately to employer file via Labor Commission portal. Photos of ice and salting records key evidence.[6][9]

suggestedAnswer.text: Winter slips common Utah courts recognize employer snow removal duty. Comp no-fault even if contributory. Insurers argue open obvious. Preserve boots clothing as evidence. PT follows for sprains.[6][9]

description: Report icy slip immediately to employer file via Labor Commission portal. Photos of ice and salting records key evidence.[6][9]
